scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "API,FE" --prefix-colors cyan,magenta "pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run dev" "pnpm --filter @workspace/sarthaksetu run dev"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.db:seed: echo 'Seeding runs automatically on API server startup. Start the API with pnpm dev.'
scripts.test: echo 'Tests not yet configured. Add test runner and test files to enable.' && exit 0
